summary: Completed testing of PDF Template Selection and Excel Import/Export features. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed all elements are accessible and functional.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement recommended

PUT /api/auth/profile - PDF template selection persists correctly
Template selection works for all 5 templates (classic, modern, professional, elegant, ocean)
GET /api/products/export/excel - Excel export returns valid XLSX file with correct headers
POST /api/products/import/excel - Excel import adds new products
POST /api/products/import/excel - Updates existing products by SKU match
Imported products verified in database via GET /api/products
GET /api/quotes/{id}/pdf - PDF generation with classic template
GET /api/quotes/{id}/pdf - PDF generation with modern template
PDF generation works with all 5 templates
Settings page loads with PDF Template card visible
5/5 template options displayed in Settings UI
Template selection updates UI with checkmark indicator
Products page loads with Export and Import buttons visible
Add Product dialog opens with all form fields
critical_code_review_comments: Add aria-describedby attribute to DialogContent components for accessibility compliance

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All PDF template and Excel import/export UI elements working)
